page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The system is configured with 1 thread per core, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyper-threading.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring network-attached storage options for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.c7.32xlarge offers a high density of dedicated compute resources relative to its memory footprint, making it suitable for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory allocations or local storage. Appropriate workloads include high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, and large-scale web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this server provides 256.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, but it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. Designed for compute-intensive tasks, its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 CPU-to-RAM ratio offer qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring high processing density without massive memory overhead. It is suited for batch processing, scientific simulations, and compute-heavy enterprise applications.

tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized instance featuring one hundred twenty-eight physical cores and sixty-four gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth.
